nasb.text: ‘Call to Me and I will answer you, and I will tell you great and mighty things, which you do not know.’

esv.text: Call to me and I will answer you, and will tell you great and hidden things that you have not known.

cnv.text: ‘你呼求我，我就應允你，並且把你所不知道的那些偉大奧祕的事告訴你。’

ccb.text: ‘你呼求我，我就回应你，并且把你不知道的伟大、奥妙之事告诉你。
